acceptance_threshold: No short shot; weld lines, air traps, sink, shrink, and warp risks mapped to every A-surface and functional aperture.
notes: Mold-flow report with pressure, fill time, weld lines, air traps, sink, shrink, and warp plots.

acceptance_threshold: Gate vestige off cosmetic hero surfaces; gate area and runner balance signed against orange blush/streak limits.
notes: Signed gate/runner recommendation with gate land, gate area, vestige location, and alternate fan-gate decision.

acceptance_threshold: Ejector marks hidden from A-surfaces; boss and snap-hook release forces signed by toolmaker.
notes: Ejector layout markup with witness-mark acceptance and any added blade/sleeve ejectors.

acceptance_threshold: Cooling circuits cover boss, camera, USB-C, and long rail hot spots with expected cycle-time and warp impact.
notes: Cooling layout with channel diameter, clearance, circuiting, expected cycle time, and hot-spot risk.

acceptance_threshold: Steel-safe offsets tied to GD&T datums for glass bond ledge, USB-C aperture, buttons, camera, bosses, and rails.
notes: Shrink/warp allowance table tied to GD&T datums and first-article CMM plan.

acceptance_threshold: Orange plaques pass color/gloss/texture limits and gate-blush samples under production lighting.
notes: Color plaque, texture plaque, gate-blush limit sample, and signed CMF acceptance criteria.

acceptance_threshold: DOE includes dimensional CMM, cosmetic inspection, short-shot/fill, flash, sink, warp, and assembly fit runs.
notes: DOE run sheet and acceptance plan for first shots before DVT tool tuning.
